passives.name: Nightstalker
passives.effects: Your abilities deal {{as|{{rd|{{pp|0 to 22.5 for 11|0 to 70|key=%|key1=%|type=target's '''missing''' health|showtype=false}}|{{pp|0 to 12.5 for 11|0 to 70|key=%|key1=%|type=target's '''missing''' health|showtype=false}}}}|hp}} {{as|(based on target's '''missing''' health)}} increased damage against enemy champions. Scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy champion within 3 seconds of damaging them renders you {{tip|untargetable}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds, which ends prematurely if you perform an action that {{tip|break stealth|breaks stealth}}.

effects_structured.raw: Your abilities deal {{as {{rd {{pp 0 to 22.5 for 11 0 to 70 key=% key1=% type=target's '''missing''' health showtype=false}} {{pp 0 to 12.5 for 11 0 to 70 key=% key1=% type=target's '''missing''' health showtype=false}}}} hp}} {{as (based on target's '''missing''' health)}} increased damage against enemy champions

Scoring a {{tip takedown}} against an enemy champion within 3 seconds of damaging them renders you {{tip untargetable}} for {{fd 1.5}} seconds, which ends prematurely if you perform an action that {{tip break stealth breaks stealth}}.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified page-level Nightstalker semantics: ability damage amplification scales with target missing-health percent (melee/ranged split), and takedown within 3 seconds of damaging a champion grants 1.5-second untargetability that breaks on stealth-breaking actions.

Execution nuance from page-level notes: Nightstalker takedown branch does not trigger while channeling and does not trigger from clone takedowns; trigger also destroys incoming non-turret projectiles.
Mode-availability note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped (Prismatic Anvil source); treat non-Arena availability as mode-gated.

Economy representation note: Tier-1 datasets expose distributed-item gold fields (total 1000 / sell 400); these values are retained for reconciliation while acquisition remains Prismatic Item Anvil/mode-scoped rather than standard shop purchase.
